title: Implement Power Function
hints: Use fast exponentiation (divide and conquer) to compute A^B efficiently.
For even B: A^B = (A^(B/2))^2, for odd B: A^B = (A^(B/2))^2 * A.
Apply modulo at each step to prevent overflow: (x * y) % C = ((x % C) * (y % C)) % C.
Handle base cases: if A == 0 return 0, if B == 0 return 1.
For negative A, ensure the result is non-negative using ((A % C) + C) % C.
